title: POST /api/v2/media — async upload endpoint
description: Implement the async media upload endpoint. Accepts multipart/form-data with 'file' field and optional 'description' and 'focus' fields. Returns 202 Accepted immediately with a partial MediaAttachment object containing the URL to poll. Spawns a tokio task for processing. Validate file size and MIME type before accepting. Reject video with 422.
design: Accepted MIME types: image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif, image/webp, image/heic. Max size from config (default 40MB). 202 response: {id, url:null, preview_url:null, text_url:null, meta:null, description, blurhash:null}. Processing state tracked in media table with a processing flag or null blurhash as sentinel.
acceptance_criteria: Ivory can upload an image and receive 202 with url field; GET /api/v1/media/:id returns processing status then complete attachment; video upload returns 422 with helpful error message; file over limit returns 422; unsupported MIME type returns 422; description stored and returned
